notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes visible battle events (围攻方源, 对战, 冲入监天塔) and stated plans (冰塞川决定趁方源牵制龙公时夺取宿命蛊). The plan of 冰塞川 to seize 宿命蛊 is stated openly in the narration, not hidden knowledge. The fact that 冰塞川 has a trump card (请无极转身) is also stated in the narration as known information. No directly supported private knowledge, secret motives not already stated, or future-known information with clear source backing was found. The seed does not contain a hidden/secret fact that is not already narrated as visible.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
冰塞川的行为（命令北原蛊仙冲入监天塔夺取宿命蛊）有记录，但其动机描述为'打算利用方源牵制龙公，自己夺取宿命蛊'来自relations而非直接原文quote，且缺乏直接心理描写支撑其意图。冰塞川犹豫不决（ptr_18）表明其动机并不明确。无法从seed中提取出有足够直接支持的observedMotive和inferredMotive对。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual conflicts between named persons (方源, 龙公, 苍玄子, 方正, 秦鼎菱, 冰塞川, etc.) and individual actions. No named collective faction/group/clan/family with a concrete stake in the seed facts is clearly identified as a collective actor under pressure. 天庭 (Heavenly Court) is implied through individual members (龙公, 苍玄子, 秦鼎菱, 方正) but not explicitly named as a faction in the seed entities/relations. 长生天 (Longevity Heaven) is implied through 冰塞川, 牛魔, 花子 but not explicitly listed as a faction entity. 北原蛊仙 (Northern Plains Gu Immortals) appears in events as a group but is a loose regional label, not a named faction/clan/family with defined collective stakes. No single collective actor with clear source-backed pressure axis can be confidently extracted.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
